title: UAE accuses Iran of renewed drone and missile attacks
description: A large fire has broken out at the key Emirati oil port of Fujairah, which lies beyond the largely-blocked Strait of Hormuz.
content:
A large fire has broken out at the key oil port of Fujairah in the United Arab Emirates (UAE) after it was hit by a drone attack from Iran, local officials say.
Three Indian nationals were injured in the strike, officials said.

title: Jesse Derry: Chelsea teenager taken to hospital after head injury
description: Teenage Chelsea forward Jesse Derry is taken to hospital as a precaution after sustaining a head injury in Monday's Premier League loss to Nottingham Forest.
content:
Teenage Chelsea forward Jesse Derry has been taken to hospital as a precaution after sustaining a head injury in the 3-1 Premier League loss to Nottingham Forest.

description: Read everything Mikel Arteta had to say ahead of our Champions League semi-final against Atletico Madrid

title: Leipzig: Two killed after car drives into crowd of people
description: A driver ploughed into people in the centre of the German city of Leipzig on Monday, leaving two people dead, police said. | ITV National News
content:
A driver has ploughed into people in the centre of the German city of Leipzig on Monday, leaving two people dead, police said.
An additional three people were seriously injured in what officials believe was a deliberate rampage, Mayor Burkhard Jung s... [1334 chars]

title: 'Beautiful, loving' girl, 9, tragically dies within hours of cancer diagnosis
description: Millie Rose Hedley was described by her mum as a “beautiful, loving and kind-hearted” girl -the youngster had been diagnosed with acute myeloid leukaemia (AML), a rare, fast-growing cancer.
content:
Millie Rose Hedley was described by her mum as a “beautiful, loving and kind-hearted” girl -the youngster had been diagnosed with acute myeloid leukaemia (AML), a rare, fast-growing cancer.
